name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I was just on Chris Hayes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I was just on Chris Hayes' show to talk about how Medicare and Social Security are at risk in the upcoming elections -- and how I'm fighting like hell to protect them. Peter, I need you fighting with me in these final 15 days of the race. [**Can you pitch in?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4799/1476577634/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?refcode=sbe181022pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4798/1476577634/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181022pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4798/1476577634/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181022pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4798/1476577634/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181022pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4799/1476577634/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?refcode=sbe181022pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Last week, this headline ran in the _Washington Post_ : **"McConnell calls deficit 'very disturbing,' blames federal spending."** Now let's make two things clear: First, _the deficit is exploding because of the tax bill Republicans passed._ It handed huge tax breaks to the wealthiest 1%, Wall Street, and huge companies. And according to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, it will add $1.4 TRILLION to the deficit by 2027. Second, when McConnell says "federal spending" _he's talking about "entitlement programs," also known as Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security._ Republicans want to blame the rising deficit on these critical lifelines, even though there have been no major changes to those programs in the past two years that would explain the sudden ballooning of the deficit. Here's what really happened: **Republicans wrote a big fat check to billionaires -- and now they want hardworking families to pay for it.** Not on my watch. [**I'm fighting every day to make sure Ohioans are able to get ahead. Slashing funding for programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security would do the opposite. We cannot let Republicans win Ohio's Senate seat -- not when the stakes are this high. Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help our campaign reach the finish line.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeda/4462dc26/728c57fe/201f4799/1476577634/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181022pm?refcode=sbe181022pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") When it comes to protecting Ohioans, I will not back down. Thank you for standing by me. With tremendous gratitude, Sherrod
---

subject: A toss-up with your healthcare on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
We can save the Affordable Care Act this November, but only with your help. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, we have good news and bad news.

The good news: Josh Harder, our Democratic nominee for Congress up in the northern San Joaquin Valley for the 10th Congressional District, is **UP FIVE POINTS** against Republican incumbent Jeff Denham in the most recent poll.

The 10th District has been rated a pure toss-up, and no matter what the polls say today, the race could go either way. So we can't let the incumbent's name recognition let him win by only a handful of votes. [**Chip in to help support Josh Harder 's surging challenge >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Josh Harder and Linda S anchez:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c4e/1510568401/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM")******
---
******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c4f/1510568401/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM")******
******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c4c/1510568401/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM")******
******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c4d/1510568401/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM")******
******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c42/1510568401/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM")******
******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
The bad news: that Mitch McConnell said Republicans could try and repeal the Affordable Care Act again after the midterm elections.

In 2017, House Republicans passed their Affordable Care Act repeal by a four-vote margin, 217 to 213. If we flip the House, we'll shut down _any_ chance of the GOP passing another repeal.

This Election Day, Californians can stand up and affirm their support of the Affordable Care Act. There are four House Republicans facing "toss-up" races in our state this November -- and Jeff Denham is one of them.

We can save the Affordable Care Act this November, but only with your help. [**Can you rush a donation today? There are only 15 days left until the election!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Onward,

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181022_Harder_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c40/1510568401/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c41/1510568401/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668a/4ac3d62d/6a05ed68/1ce29c46/1510568401/VEsHBg/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Norwalk, CA 90652

body:

We know Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016 so this race will be close, and he's come here to call for my defeat so it's at the top of his radar. Now, after my vote against Kavanaugh his base is even more fired up to do everything to defeat me. We just can't let that happen.
**[Please make a contribution and show everyone that this is the year Democrats put a stop to Trump and the GOP hold over Washington. I promise to fight with everything I have between now and Election Day to win this race.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181022PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for everything,
Tina

name: IN POLL ALERT
subject: we could be in trouble (Braun's poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Our opponent, Rep. Mike Braun, released an internal poll this morning that shows him leading Joe 44% - 40%, just outside the margin of error. He thinks the momentum is with his campaign -- and we can' |
---
| | "Indiana, represented by Democratic Sen. Joe Donnelly, has become **the epicenter of the fight for the Senate 's long-term future**"
\-- _Politico_ Peter,

Our opponent, Rep. Mike Braun, released an internal poll this morning that shows him _leading_ Joe **44% - 40%** , just outside the margin of error. He thinks the momentum is with his campaign -- **and we can 't let that be right**.

See, Rep. Braun has millions of dollars in dark money support. He has Mitch McConnell and President Trump on his side. If he has momentum, too... well, we're in trouble.

But don't panic: **we still have 15 days to win this race and we WILL win with your help. [Will you sign up to volunteer in these critical last few weeks?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d80/7377f838/2648b8ae/51f8b60e/828680447/VEsH/ "http://joeforindiana.com/events")**

We weren't planning on sending this email today, Peter, but we had no choice. If Rep. Braun's poll is right, and he wins this race, he'll become President Trump's latest yes-man in the Senate. He'll vote in lockstep for the worst parts of Mitch McConnell's extreme Republican agenda, like slashing Social Security and dismantling Medicare.

**We have to hit back against Rep. Braun 's aggressive paid media campaign by reaching out to every Hoosier voter.** And our field team _needs_ your help to do so.

[**Can we count on you to volunteer for this campaign in the final weeks?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d80/7377f838/2648b8ae/51f8b60e/828680447/VEsE/ "http://joeforindiana.com/events") There are just 15 days left until Election Day. Let's win this.

Thanks,

Team Donnelly

| **[**DONATE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d80/7377f838/2648b8ae/51f8b609/828680447/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-joementum?refcode=20181022.4is&amount=20")**

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Just a few hours left, Peter

body:

Peter,

**Two seats:** That's all that stands between us and flipping the Senate in two weeks.

**A few hours:** That's all that stands between us and the deadline for our final Flip the Senate Fund.

We only need to raise $16,580 more to hit our $250,000 goal and give our candidates the support they need to win seats and take back the Senate majority.

**Jump into action _right now_ by donating $3 before midnight to help hit our goal:**

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: Wendy Rogers and Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
By standing side by side with Steve Bannon, Wendy Rogers left no room for doubt. She not only holds extreme policy positions that would hurt Arizona families -- she also embraces the kind of divisive,
Friends, This weekend, Wendy Rogers showed us her true colors. Of course, we already knew she was extreme. She wants to end Social Security, after all, and take away your earned benefits. But by standing side by side with Steve Bannon, Rogers left no room for doubt. She not only holds extreme policy positions that would hurt Arizona families -- she also embraces the kind of divisive, right-wing politics that Bannon practices. **I won 't stand for it, friends.** [**This race is tight, and winning is critical to taking back the House in 15 days, so I would appreciate it if you could make a donation to my campaign today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")Together, we will fight the influence of Bannon and defeat Rogers this November. Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Team O'Halleran Subject: 🚨STEVE BANNON in AZ-01 🚨 Team, _We told you Wendy Rogers was too extreme for Arizona. But if you need more proof:_ **STEVE** **BANNON -- Donald Trump 's right-wing former White House chief strategist -- came to Arizona to boost Rogers this weekend.** Team, Steve Bannon's extreme, divisive brand of politics has no place in our district, and we can't afford to elect his favorite candidate to Congress -- but his visit is proof that the far-right will do anything they can to unseat Tom in November. [**Can you make a donation right here, right now, to help us fight back against Bannon and DEFEAT Rogers in 15 days?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. ---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This race is close -- _a Republican poll released this weekend claims Rogers is now tied with Tom_ \-- so we should expect more people like Bannon to boost Rogers in the days ahead. After all, she will be a rubber-stamp for their toxic, unpopular agenda, while Tom is an independent voice for Arizona families, so they are desperate to unseat him.

We can't let that happen, and we're counting on this grassroots team to help us. [**Make a donation today to stop Bannon and re-elect Tom.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.22_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Thanks for having Tom's back!

**Peter,**

**Early voting began Monday in a big way!** At each end of this District, we had record turnout, with lines of enthusiastic voters. **In Travis County, local official Bruce Elfant reports that Monday's vote exceeded presidential levels.** **And in Harris County, record turnout exceeded the 2008 and 2012 presidential elections! ** We will have access to more county data soon, but all signs point to record voter participation across Texas. [**Donate today to support our get-out-the-vote operation!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2787161/17491866/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTUxYTk5Ni1iYmQ2LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHtypiW5qH_msF2KzT_PRLjv_e0SqAGfZc6lD8aX6hI=) We are in nonstop outreach mode to get every possible supporter to the polls. **In the last 10 days, we have contacted tens of thousands of voters via phonecalls, texts, and knocks at the door. ** Record turnout will win us a seat in the House. clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, Early voting began Monday in a big way! At each end of this District, we had record turnout, with lines of enthusiastic voters. In Travis County, local official Bruce Elfant reports that Monday's vote exceeded presidential levels. And in Harris County, record turnout exceeded the 2008 and 2012 presidential elections! We will have access to more county data soon, but all signs point to record voter participation across Texas. = We are in nonstop outreach mode to get every possible supporter to the polls. In the last 10 days, we have contacted tens of thousands of voters via phonecalls, texts, and knocks at the door. Record turnout will win us a seat in the House. And with every voter contact, we support Democrats up and down the ballot -- and build a stronger foundation for progressive change in Texas. = or = Working for you, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

subject: New Health Options for Small-Business Employees
body:
| |
---
# _New Health Options for Small-Business Employees_
“Americans should have more options than one plan their employer selects for them. And they should be able to maintain their insurance when they change employers or exit the job market to raise a family or care for a sick loved one,” Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin, and HHS Secretary Alex Azar write in _The Wall Street Journal_. “That’s why the administration is proposing a regulation that would create a new way for employers to provide health coverage for employees.” “This proposal would give millions of workers and their families more control over their health care. It also holds the promise of more-efficient health-care spending, expanded business growth, and higher wages.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/new-health-options-for-small-business-employees-1540249941) During an interview with [_**USA Today**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2018/10/22/trump-halt-migrant-caravan-many-troops-necessary/1731717002/) yesterday, President Donald Trump “vowed to send as many troops as necessary to the U.S.-Mexican border to block a growing caravan of Central American migrants, calling their trek ‘an assault on our country,’” David Jackson, Susan Page, and John Fritze report. “I think this could be a blessing in disguise because it shows how bad our laws are,” the President said aboard Air Force One. “The Democrats are responsible for that.” The[ _**Investor’s Business Daily**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/medicare-for-all-midterm-elections/) editorial board writes that Democrats have been trying to hide just how extreme their “Medicare for All” plan truly is. In fact, Democrats aren't telling American families “anything about what ‘Medicare for All’ means. Probably because the plan would be the most radical socialization of health care on the planet.” “Chancellor Angela Merkel has offered government support to efforts to open up Germany to U.S. gas, a key concession to President Trump as he tries to loosen Russia’s grip on Europe’s largest energy market,” Bojan Pancevski reports in _**[The Wall Street Journal](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/in-win-for-trump-merkel-changes-course-on-u-s-gas-imports-1540209647)**_. U.S. Ambassador to Germany Richard Grenell responded to the news by saying, “We’re creating jobs and we’re also deepening the trans-Atlantic relationship. The U.S. is totally committed to bringing U.S. LNG to Europe and to Germany.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjIxODIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjYyMTgyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0NjA2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

clean_body: | | New Health Options for Small-Business Employees “Americans should have more options than one plan their employer selects for them. And they should be able to maintain their insurance when they change employers or exit the job market to raise a family or care for a sick loved one,” Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin, and HHS Secretary Alex Azar write in The Wall Street Journal. “That’s why the administration is proposing a regulation that would create a new way for employers to provide health coverage for employees.” “This proposal would give millions of workers and their families more control over their health care. It also holds the promise of more-efficient health-care spending, expanded business growth, and higher wages.” During an interview with yesterday, President Donald Trump “vowed to send as many troops as necessary to the U.S.-Mexican border to block a growing caravan of Central American migrants, calling their trek ‘an assault on our country,’” David Jackson, Susan Page, and John Fritze report. “I think this could be a blessing in disguise because it shows how bad our laws are,” the President said aboard Air Force One. “The Democrats are responsible for that.” The editorial board writes that Democrats have been trying to hide just how extreme their “Medicare for All” plan truly is. In fact, Democrats aren't telling American families “anything about what ‘Medicare for All’ means. Probably because the plan would be the most radical socialization of health care on the planet.” “Chancellor Angela Merkel has offered government support to efforts to open up Germany to U.S. gas, a key concession to President Trump as he tries to loosen Russia’s grip on Europe’s largest energy market,” Bojan Pancevski reports in . U.S. Ambassador to Germany Richard Grenell responded to the news by saying, “We’re creating jobs and we’re also deepening the trans-Atlantic relationship. The U.S. is totally committed to bringing U.S. LNG to Europe and to Germany.” | |

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Let's have Tina's back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
As my colleague in the Senate this past year, I've seen Tina Smith go right to work solving problems for Minnesotans. Tina is ready to win this election so she can keep working for Minnesotans, but no one can do it alone.
Tina's campaign is entering the final stretch, and they're making decisions today about what they can do before Election Day. **Can you help by donating to her campaign today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tina Smith will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xEIYoFVIs82l0ieNLzkaKLTiseQ%2Bs8FF)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=j3d04aW3tFBemN5ciTr5XD5B1vmNk8QG)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WeevreO7lrNxqnP0vE%2Bo%2BLTiseQ%2Bs8FF)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FHPhh1q4k2k0PkTLGyjnc7TiseQ%2Bs8FF)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ipccCgmdJpd0KtGL1wvZA7TiseQ%2Bs8FF)****
Tina is committed to getting the job done for the people of our state, but _she 's also facing one of the only special elections for the U.S. Senate in 2018._
The Administration has made it clear that they are targeting Minnesota and targeting Tina. Let's send a message back that we believe in combating climate change, getting dark money out of politics, and preserving access to health care by helping my colleague Tina Smith.
Minnesota needs Tina in the Senate to keep getting the job done for our state. **[Will you donate $20 to her campaign today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2CR7cV45FZHKZEbJdMRDP7TiseQ%2Bs8FF)**
Thanks, your support means a lot.
\-- Amy

From: Lauren Reyes, Virginia Victory Field Director
Date: [Tues Oct, 23, 2018, 6:53 a.m.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d9/3e0906/774a9295/3e37dfb6/2791016500/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Tues+Oct+23+2018+653+am&utm_campaign=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND")
Subject: Field Plan for Virginia 2018
To: Kaine HQ All Staff

Hi, team --

I know everyone has been busy with the new fundraising reports and Corey Stewart's negative ads but wanted to pass along some **critical information about the House candidates and field efforts:**
[**NEW CBS/YouGov poll:**
If voter turnout is low, polling predicts Republicans hold on to the House by ONE seat.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d9/3e0906/774a9295/3e37dfb4/2791016500/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+NEW+CBSYouGov+poll%0A%09%09%09%09%09If+voter+turnout&utm_campaign=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND")
---
Of course being in GOTV our sole focus is turnout. It's an off-year election and even with all the current momentum, there are signs all over the place that the negative turn Corey Stewart's message has taken could keep people from the polls and lose key margins in our targeted House races.

**So what I 'm suggesting:** We need to increase fundraising through the end of October, starting with $10,000 today that I can route to our most critical regions from Hampton Roads to Richmond so we can win those House seats.

**Do you know anyone that can help? Please send them this link:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d9/3e0906/774a9295/3e37df8a/2791016500/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND")

The sooner I can get more staff and canvassers on the ground, the more people we can turn out. Again, please push this link far and wide: [https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10d9/3e0906/774a9295/3e37df8f/2791016500/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181023_1_FR_LR_field-LDND")

Kind regards,

_Lauren_

Lauren Reyes
Virginia Victory Coordinated Campaign Field Director

name: Jason Yates
subject: Don’t let your faith be outvoted.
body:
Peter,
**Did you know the U.S. ranks 26 out of 32 in the worst voter turnout among developed countries?**
Every election cycle, millions of Americans forgo their constitutional right to vote—passively allowing others to determine this country’s direction and destiny.
You may not classify yourself as partisan—or even political. Yet politics impacts YOUR everyday freedoms:
* **To worship** freely.
* **To voice your political beliefs** in private and public.
* **To live out your faith** at work.
* **To raise your children** with biblical values.
* **To make personal healthcare choices** for life-altering and life-threatening conditions.
* **To protect the sanctity of life** from the earliest stages until God calls each home.

Two weeks from today YOU DECIDE America’s future—and your own.
Let’s make this election the #1 voter turnout for faith-based Americans.
Make sure you are ready to vote by doing three simple things:
1. View a **[sample ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOH98B_4yRCWrk1xo9WYHQrh5hWvT6dlIAFui2nCJpCMyA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181023com01&n=1)** to know exactly what’s on your ballot.
2. Consult a **[Voter Guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOH98B_4yRCWrk1xo9WYHQrhc6-DkccfCyQs0zo9lqYwEQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181023com01&n=2)** to learn about the candidates.
3. Find your **[polling location](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOH98B_4yRCWrk1xo9WYHQrh6PYXdcyEy1Ys-Hk36519-Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181023com01&n=3)**.

Stand for faith in the voting booth. PRAY, THINK, and VOTE
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181023com01&n=4)

clean_body: We need your focus on this election, Derek. In one week, we will be having our rally-reception with special guest Governor Chris Christie \- a crucial seven days before Election Day. I don't need to remind you that everything is on the line this election. Everything. We cannot let Democrats take away the progress Republicans have made in the Granite State. Republicans must get our message out and the NHGOP needs your help to secure the New Hampshire Advantage for another two years. Simply put, there is too much on the line right now. Murphy's Carriage House 393 NH-101, Bedford, NH 03110 Let's close out this cycle strong! You won't want to miss the NH Republican Team on Tuesday, October 30th in Bedford. Sincerely, Jim Morgan NHGOP Finance Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Brown, Craig
subject: in two weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
We're exactly **two weeks** from Election Day, friends.
You can count on Molly to follow through on her promise to finally put New Hampshire's working families over special interests as governor because **she refuses to accept any money from corporate special interests**. She's accountable to you. That's it.
Meanwhile, **Chris Sununu relies on big-dollar help from right-wing groups like the Koch network.** They're _pouring_ money into New Hampshire to make sure he continues pushing their corporate agenda forward.
**That's why we can't waste this critical match opportunity so close to the election. If you've been waiting to give, now is the moment, because there are _only hours left_ to meet our must-hit $15,000 goal.**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: What are you up to tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I will be facing Rep. Ted Budd in my first debate tonight. While I share my vision for North Carolina, Ted Budd will certainly be doing rhetorical gymnastics to defend his special interest-first agen
|
---

| | **I will be facing Rep. Ted Budd in my first debate tonight.** While I share my vision for North Carolina, Ted Budd will certainly be doing rhetorical gymnastics to defend his special interest-first agenda. We're setting up a Debate Day goal to show how many of us are fighting against the Budd agenda. [**Will you be one of the 500 supporters we need to give before midnight? Any amount will get us closer to that goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427905/e3b7d3/5e80f0e9/2555596c/3312317529/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023?refcode=kme181023_m") Budd and his special interest allies are spending huge sums of money against me. It averages out to tens of thousands of dollars __a day.__ But you know what? **None of that spending will help Ted Budd on that debate stage tonight.** When you're at a podium answering questions, you can't hide behind attack ads. Your special interest allies can't grab the microphone and answer for you. Tonight, it's Budd, me, a moderator, and our ideas. I can't wait. Of course, once I'm out of the debate, all that spending comes back into play. **That's where this Debate Day goal comes in.** [**Be one of the 500 supporters we need to fight beside this campaign before midnight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427905/e3b7d3/5e80f0e9/2555596c/3312317529/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181023?refcode=kme181023_m") I'll make you proud tonight. Thanks for standing with me. Kathy
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress

clean_body: I will be facing Rep. Ted Budd in my first debate tonight. While I share my vision for North Carolina, Ted Budd will certainly be doing rhetorical gymnastics to defend his special interest-first agen | | | I will be facing Rep. Ted Budd in my first debate tonight. While I share my vision for North Carolina, Ted Budd will certainly be doing rhetorical gymnastics to defend his special interest-first agenda. We're setting up a Debate Day goal to show how many of us are fighting against the Budd agenda. "" Budd and his special interest allies are spending huge sums of money against me. It averages out to tens of thousands of dollars a day. But you know what? None of that spending will help Ted Budd on that debate stage tonight. When you're at a podium answering questions, you can't hide behind attack ads. Your special interest allies can't grab the microphone and answer for you. Tonight, it's Budd, me, a moderator, and our ideas. I can't wait. Of course, once I'm out of the debate, all that spending comes back into play. That's where this Debate Day goal comes in. "" I'll make you proud tonight. Thanks for standing with me. Kathy | | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Fighting for you. Sound familiar?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
"Fighting for You" is the same slogan Hillary Clinton herself used in her 2016 campaign. In case you haven’t heard, Senator McCaskill recently kicked off her new “Fighting for You” tour.

Wait, doesn’t that sound familiar? That’s because “Fighting for You" is the same slogan Hillary Clinton used in her 2016 campaign. [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e595f88e5fb4eb49c1c41064479c399&_e=IrrbE-GlkgV6jPzBuDzcpaibGOWqYF88MwqTmtr6W184p1eRmkIc-4CTDIMojlXnniA6HRIUnnhXp9Baf1WMmRh15qPm7kVkw_7_FtCXyPqudZtwp7kZx2EpVuTiANZqbyF1kvUhDWi8DjeKXdcvJbl3tBz1oeOW3RFINPC_lMOe3DQ9UG2WRaZNrs_NKWfHHZyOUhY-YZ0oYUwVbLfZP3BAcqXTFZJ7K805bsTKx8fQ7mtVw0fUGgsbxmPfflxl_2Y0hfV8DGwHhK1z-YRkHqUdNPeprEZTYvQorTOR4VA%3D) [ SEE FOR YOURSELF HERE ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e595f88e5fb4eb49c1c41064479c399&_e=IrrbE-GlkgV6jPzBuDzcpaibGOWqYF88MwqTmtr6W184p1eRmkIc-4CTDIMojlXnniA6HRIUnnhXp9Baf1WMmRcYGOOXdC4h8xDkuk1N1AqzmFJA-r3eZ4Eb_8XmNCQUCsalJk1OZUkuai-ObNHTrH3FWcR5AzleBF0F0tVAFAPtlih7XUf80tLO76X_28-cKBepONsKZZa85RwZ3DABPm0LR3yPYvRyoXM6FL6s5AnJWRmklohtEjTccgWvD9H7ah_iu05yNqfF9f-sqzvRPgOaO22rBcNZnT47S4FQDtw%3D) It’s no wonder Senator McCaskill is choosing to recycle Hillary Clinton’s old slogans while she continues to recycle her failed policies too. They both want open borders, higher taxes, and they both oppose President Trump. **Missouri opposed Hillary Clinton in 2016, and it’s time for us to do the same to Senator McCaskill now.** [ MAKE YOUR DOUBLE MATCHED DONATION TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e595f88e5fb4eb49c1c41064479c399&_e=IrrbE-GlkgV6jPzBuDzcpaibGOWqYF88MwqTmtr6W184p1eRmkIc-4CTDIMojlXnniA6HRIUnnhXp9Baf1WMmZTrWSs19gnjQYxpRhp71_VcmgsEhwYg-Dwwa9vWWLzCazPQUjtWNmwdDrXSRl2jWWDDG8GitPS-FoSYE8i9lW-APuEeHDsnFTiEYdX0Ccp9fUhVQZqCiQiWjwT081vhR3FPytLo9Ze_hLypX-7vga7_jcP7v2JB7Cpo_v440i6KRo4lREn_DrkxKsMPFJWL5ZGcTqMH5-qbqHciuaGsTew%3D) We’re doing all we can to spread our message of bringing change to Washington. Our team is building momentum, but Senator McCaskill is still well funded, and _we can’t win this election without your help._

Thankfully, a group of donors is still offering to match every last donation that comes in between now and our final October 31st deadline, making your contribution worth twice as much. If you’ve thought about donating, now is the most crucial time to do so. [ MAKE YOUR DOUBLE MATCHED DONATION TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e595f88e5fb4eb49c1c41064479c399&_e=IrrbE-GlkgV6jPzBuDzcpaibGOWqYF88MwqTmtr6W184p1eRmkIc-4CTDIMojlXnniA6HRIUnnhXp9Baf1WMmQZbgBGxJ4WuCuhp6uqlykoTunlHf5Q6iUwAO5gg2ch4cSBRaIa5QcXIvPpFxDIhk3Vel3Li6bqNZYDTt3hcsgoMDKZ2wdV7SQQi4Oz41UcVExEnfpuv_5u4-J9MjFbyM_fNkjA8zqj6PeeB_gksrFdbq2nY55SXOdG-pRwqmQMJ_RVC1zQscD_DbyHo1ZMJu3_lRWARzrtzU6RkkIyeMA0%3D) [Donate $20, $10, or even $5 before October 31st, and take advantage of having your donating matched.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e595f88e5fb4eb49c1c41064479c399&_e=IrrbE-GlkgV6jPzBuDzcpaibGOWqYF88MwqTmtr6W184p1eRmkIc-4CTDIMojlXnniA6HRIUnnhXp9Baf1WMmSpyZtnRE2fTBCA-2z98pBb5hRNhWu4JZu-XTQNcEBgekQv0l6qX4I6Z78jn-kbyAFtygVOe4MEIPyThnPPWEse6zdDhnSgJwvJp_wMStIBOm5sVXQhIFwUBwRs3EyuXgPPoEzPcQJgaOkZHc7FouXdHA8B6UWdZuiklT-945jeJTxodzBtJSM4v-hZ_eevw0HEi4P2PwICApmUu3O25bGs%3D) Thank you for being part of the team.

Josh Hawley

Hey Friend,

I can't believe I'm saying this but there are just two weeks left until Election Day. And after our rally with President Barack Obama yesterday in Las Vegas, I'm fired up and ready to go!

President Obama told the crowd, **" this election is more important than any other of our lifetime,"** and he's not kidding. He's supporting our campaign because he knows just how much is at stake.

**[If you agree with President Obama that this election is crucial, then chip in $5 or more today to help us finish strong and win in November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3BuUJOlRDFpcCPWxiAE6TfZwpTvUrfGSdIXTcjpbl0=/oNcP7HJB_Z9vSH_4ylmFx8hzfr7YqMKHOdKpTzVDJbg=?gpsid=37_57_4649&refcode=em18_181023_2wks_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_2wks_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3BuUJOlRDFpcCPWxiAE6TfZwpTvUrfGSdIXTcjpbl0=/oNcP7HJB_Z9vSH_4ylmFx8hzfr7YqMKHOdKpTzVDJbg=?gpsid=37_57_4649&refcode=em18_181023_2wks_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_2wks_IG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso) [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3BuUJOlRDFpcCPWxiAE6TfZwpTvUrfGSdIXTcjpbl0=/oNcP7HJB_Z9vSH_4ylmFx8hzfr7YqMKHOdKpTzVDJbg=?gpsid=37_57_4649&refcode=em18_181023_2wks_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_2wks_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
Early Vote is underway and our entire team is working hard to mobilize volunteers and get out the vote, but we have to keep fundraising, too.

We need gas to drive around the state, signs to put in yards, TV ads to get our message out -- and all these things cost money.

**[So please chip in $5 or more today and help us win this and keep Nevada moving forward.](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3BuUJOlRDFpcCPWxiAE6TfZwpTvUrfGSdIXTcjpbl0=/oNcP7HJB_Z9vSH_4ylmFx8hzfr7YqMKHOdKpTzVDJbg=?gpsid=37_57_4649&refcode=em18_181023_2wks_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_2wks_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thank you,

Steve

name: Team Scholten
subject: Online Exclusive! 💻 MUST SEE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**How do you build a campaign:**
...that is funded by regular people?
...that fights for everyday Iowans and not special interests?
...that stands up for common decency and sense of community?
...that bridges divides instead of creating them?

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I need you with me tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
During this campaign, I've met Georgians whose lives have been affected by both our state's successes and its failures. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa71f/34a064cc/1a040b3/70d65bc/352669565/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, During this campaign, I've met Georgians whose lives have been affected by both our state's successes and its failures. I have spoken with Georgians who have lost health care and need Medicaid expansion to survive. Georgians who have made mistakes, who've paid their time, and who are now looking for a chance to re-enter society, healthy and whole. Young Georgians who need better funding for their public schools and more opportunities to build a better life for themselves and their families. With every handshake, every hug, and every conversation, I am reminded that when I walk on stage tonight to face my opponent, I will not be alone. I will stand, proudly, with my own family in my heart and my Georgia family on my mind. And while my opponent will attack us from every possible angle, I am not afraid. I carry with me the hopes of hardworking Georgians whose souls are rooted in this red clay, who stand firm in our values of faith, family, service, and responsibility. These are the values we're fighting for. Beyond the debate stage, the roaring headlines, and the final barrage of television ads, this election is about who we are as a people - and who we have the potential to become. The choices we make over the next two weeks - to get out and vote early, to knock on doors, to make a donation at a critical time - will determine whether we are able to build a Georgia where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. We are in the fight of a generation, and if we stand together, we can win. Will you stand with me tonight? **[Please contribute $3 to help us build a Georgia we can all be proud of. The direction our state will be taken in will come down to just a few votes, so we can't forget what's at stake, and we can't stop fighting, not even for a second.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa71f/34a064cc/1a040b3/70d65bd/352669565/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIzMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10232018-full")** I know I will not be alone at tonight's debate, and I want you to know that you aren't alone either. I'm fighting for you. And I'm fighting with you. I will continue to do so long past November. Thank you for everything you've done to support our campaign. I couldn't ask for a better team by my side. Sincerely yours, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa71f/34a064cc/1a040b3/70d65bd/352669565/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDIzMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10232018-full")**

name: Greg Pence
subject: We Remember
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
Thirty-five years ago, we lost soldiers, sailors, and Marines. Today, we remember the 241 Americans who lost their lives in the Beirut Barracks... [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=43c33c2d0211424aa772dce0a9cbaa25&_e=qfELjOBuW_0agcDv-T1HoayRY6uFB1HW5nEM1VGXDSb_vhShC_jPDJ6dibFAj6VEAXuAYjLgv2PpmT9W5dz2ryK3zPTFWCBmwhOFeJElIlfrrz55HLan0XI7fxRKHdXgKTYyLWNmXlXbd8FbwHR1QkuilnS9JhO-YhOVnDPK247QDgY8zTEUOfzDPR7kLZXQ0sCsd3ONa59hKdowD5NeCAxkMs3MT7feVUtrIYtwtSWLOhNOQrP7BT1JZKh1IaZUwbqyAPK3V9apIKcnmHlrNgyvH7k7yakMVqIVFOfSqGoQUlDEHyeoIyxmhKgXmTkcne466H5r_NfYfV-yUBg2-752bhDBH0x8pJ6ImcvBZdOHuh7Vzc3XihR5DMtF1OxXtCok0XXHZ8Ogt1cEAiY6X8Mr2igRHaERqEFlCY7uzQ4%3D) | |
---
Thirty-five years ago, we lost soldiers, sailors, and Marines.

Today, we remember the 241 Americans who lost their lives in the Beirut Barracks Bombing in Lebanon.

I was there just before that horrible day.

I was assigned to the 3rd Battalion, 3rd Marines, and in 1983, that battalion was ordered to Beirut.

This photo shows our Flag flying on top of the barracks that I and many Marines called home. We’d sit on top of the roof next to the American flag and think about our families far away, and all that we were defending back home.
[ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=43c33c2d0211424aa772dce0a9cbaa25&_e=qfELjOBuW_0agcDv-T1HoayRY6uFB1HW5nEM1VGXDSb_vhShC_jPDJ6dibFAj6VEAXuAYjLgv2PpmT9W5dz2ryK3zPTFWCBmwhOFeJElIlfrrz55HLan0XI7fxRKHdXgKTYyLWNmXlXbd8FbwHR1QkuilnS9JhO-YhOVnDPK247QDgY8zTEUOfzDPR7kLZXQ0sCsd3ONa59hKdowD5NeCJKgieb_7GnzR1hygj-jdK4zLaqAmrlxJ58Urz7ugtrf8smz1OkYGXvkaqFBFf2MAKAUrM6XK23bZzQs_8NTQemXM5Qn9Qafu67rF2ksXwlGzcDRgR0-r_RfGjZCPiQoyG7SP0KsiODnb_Nu-wpAFANiOj58L9Y1UZQfi9MvxZx7BACdjOS0p1JKPeTQi7a4I3t23gl7UmmWA4F9MH2gcBQ%3D)
Thankfully – I got to come home to my family, my new wife Denise and my parents in Columbus. My battalion shipped out of Beirut just days before the bombing.

May God Bless the fallen and their families today and every day.

May God continue to bless the United States of America as we fight our enemies near and far.

Semper Fidelis,
Greg
---
---
| |
---

subject: my sincerest thanks + a new ad!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|

Friend:
I'm grateful to all of the folks who stepped up to help out before our critical fundraising deadline. We've always relied on grassroots supporters like you, and you didn't disappoint.
Thanks to your help, we've launched our third TV ad of the campaign, _Share_. This ad focuses on our vision for One Minnesota -- where everyone has a chance to get ahead. It talks about what unites Minnesotans, while so many try to divide us. [**Click here to watch it >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RWp6D6Aqkd_5ENf5J6r4ZrC7Q1WDD2W_mzvcShUTNhU=/YhcOIXN2_HrBDhbtKC7g73g_aBQGl6IfQ2O1_wYigPQ=)
Our voter contact operation is firing on all cylinders, and we could use your help. Grassroots organizing is how we will win this election. **[Click here to knock doors or make some phone calls for the campaign>> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/RWp6D6Aqkd_5ENf5J6r4ZrC7Q1WDD2W_mzvcShUTNhU=/5d29Hp6r2rmyuVFJ-4DwrPyd2yfL1Z5Z_9vqQEdCXb0=?utm_source=walzflanagan&end_date=2018-11-07T06%3A00%3A00.000Z&start_date=2018-10-20T05%3A00%3A00.000Z)**

I'm grateful for all that you've done, and all that you continue to do for our campaign for One Minnesota. We're two weeks out, let's go win this thing.

\- Tim

subject: EPIC voter turnout in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The past 24 hours have been EPIC. We’re seeing reports that Texas early
voting results are breaking records, and you can feel the energy on the
ground in communities across the state. Texans are taking a stand and
fighting for our shared values at the ballot box.

We need your help capturing this historic energy. If we’re going to win on
November 6, we need to reach our October fundraising goal. Every dollar in
the door goes straight into our streamlined grassroots organizing program
-- the largest in Texas history.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=em20181023&t=1019&akid=20654%2E444211%2ElPetX2 ]We’re up against our FINAL end-of-month fundraising goal of this
campaign. Whether we reach it or fall short could have an impact on the
outcome of this race. So I’m asking -- if you can afford it -- give
a contribution of
$3
or more to help power Beto to victory.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=em20181023&t=1020&akid=20654%2E444211%2ElPetX2 ]Contribute
$3
»

I’ve never seen someone campaign quite like Beto does. He spent Monday and
Tuesday in Houston and San Antonio at fifteen (15!!) “vote with Beto”
events, where thousands of fired-up Texans joined him for a rally before
heading to the polls. And he’s not slowing down any time soon.

Here are some of the incredible headlines from the first day of Early
Voting:

Early voting begins with a big surge
Laredo Morning Times

County's Early Voters Nearly Break a Record
Fort Worth Star-Telegram

'Presidential Turnout' As Early Voting Begins
Austin American-Statesman

Record-Busting Day for Bexar Voters
San Antonio Express-News

Lines Form At Early Voting Locations On First Day
Tyler Morning Telegraph

First Day Smashes Midterm Record
Houston Chronicle

Early Voting Starts Strong, Beats '14, '16
Waco Tribune-Herald

Early voting in Texas opens with long lines, record 1st-day midterm
turnout
Killeen Daily Herald

Recent polls show Beto within single digits of Ted Cruz. We need to push
it to the limits in the final weeks of this election if we’re going to
make up those last few points and win on November 6.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=em20181023&t=1021&akid=20654%2E444211%2ElPetX2 ]Chip in a contribution of
$3
right now to help Beto reach our end-of-month fundraising goal.

Beto shows up for Texas every single day. Even on rainy ones (check out
the photo at the bottom of this email)! Now, it’s up to us to show up for
him in these last few days. We’re so grateful you’re with us.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

name: Anna Bukowski
subject: They're not paying for scrambled eggs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Big checks, $1000 at a time.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, this morning our opponent is sitting down to a breakfast fundraiser with Marco Rubio where rich right-wing donors will write checks $1000 at a time to her campaign. (Some expensive scrambled eggs let me tell you.) Those big dollar donors aren't paying for the privilege of eating eggs, or toast, or bacon -- they're paying so that someone will go to Washington and cut their taxes, give their corporate buddies whatever they ask for, and take health care away from hard-working people. It's a corrupt system, and we saw it play out with the giant tax cuts Senate Republicans gave to the ultra-rich and corporations last year (folks who just happen to be their biggest campaign contributors). Now, they want another ally in Washington... so here they come with their checkbooks open. **The truth is their plan could work if grassroots contributors like you don 't fight back. We can defeat our opponent's millionaire donors one $5, $10, or $25 donation a time, but it truly takes an entire team to do it.** **[So I'm asking you personally, friend: Can you pitch in so we can take on the big donors on the other side and the attack ads they're funding against Tina? We can't hold this Senate seat -- and our single digit lead -- without your help now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[Donate Now](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Tina doesn't believe in big tax cuts for corporations or for the rich, she supports overturning Citizens United and building campaigns based on people power. Thousands of small donors giving what they can and fighting back. Your contribution right now shows that you are ready to fight with her to build that. Anna Bukowski
Digital Director

Those big dollar donors aren't paying for the privilege of eating eggs, or toast, or bacon -- they're paying so that someone will go to Washington and cut their taxes, give their corporate buddies whatever they ask for, and take health care away from hard-working people. It's a corrupt system, and we saw it play out with the giant tax cuts Senate Republicans gave to the ultra-rich and corporations last year (folks who just happen to be their biggest campaign contributors). Now, they want another ally in Washington... so here they come with their checkbooks open. The truth is their plan could work if grassroots contributors like you don 't fight back. We can defeat our opponent's millionaire donors one $5, $10, or $25 donation a time, but it truly takes an entire team to do it. " Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=" " Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=" Tina doesn't believe in big tax cuts for corporations or for the rich, she supports overturning Citizens United and building campaigns based on people power. Thousands of small donors giving what they can and fighting back. Your contribution right now shows that you are ready to fight with her to build that. Anna Bukowski Digital Director

subject: Real superheroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|

| | Next week is Halloween. We'll see a lot of costumed superheroes roaming the streets. But there are real superheroes in this campaign: **You.** Months ago, I told you that our average online contribution was $26. That number still holds true. And one $26 at a time, we've built one of the strongest grassroots campaigns in the country. But with the NRA spending against me, and my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci on the attack, we need our strength again. [**Friday is October 26th. We need to raise $26,000 by midnight on the 26th to fuel the final days of our campaign. I'm personally asking you Peter: Can you match our $26 average online contribution?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffede/4462dc26/72afc8d4/201f4492/1051797158/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181023?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181023_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffede/4462dc26/72afc8d4/201f4492/1051797158/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181023?refcode=sbe181023_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** You know who the superheroes I meet every day are? The single mom in Dayton, working two jobs to pay the rent and give her kid a good life. The factory worker in Youngstown, who despite recent setbacks continues to fight for better working conditions, higher wages, and an income that pays the bills. The cancer patient in Toledo, who battles his disease and worries he'll lose his insurance every time he sees a news alert that says "GOP to repeal Affordable Care Act." Real-life superheroes don't wear masks and capes. They don't have high-tech suits or magical powers. But they do have the courage, strength, and determination to face every challenge. They're the ones I'm dedicated to helping in any way I can. And to continue that work, I need your help Peter. [**Your $26 is powerful -- it helps me keep fighting like hell for Ohio families. Chip in now, get us to our goal, and let's win the race.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffede/4462dc26/72afc8d4/201f4492/1051797158/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDIzIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181023?refcode=sbe181023_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

Friend,

I WILL NOT LET THE RADICAL DEMOCRATS WIN.

name: Climate Action via jayinslee.com
subject: Sign on NOW: Demand Climate Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Will you sign our petition to hold our national politicians accountable?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema") Friend, [**Have you signed Governor Inslee's petition yet to demand climate action?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema") In light of the devastating United Nations climate report, we're going to need some serious **_CLIMATE ACTION_** to prevent the worst effects of climate change. And that's why your voice matters so much, right now. We've got big challenges ahead of us:
* We must act to dramatically slash global greenhouse gas emissions in the next 12 years.
* We've got to reform our transportation, energy, infrastructure, and industrial systems to become more sustainable.
* We've got to eliminate the unabated carbon pollution from coal-fired power plants and instead use renewable energies like wind and solar.

We can't delay -- all of this has to happen in the next twelve years to avoid utter climate disaster, but Trump and his climate-denying administration in the other Washington are moving in the exact the opposite direction. [**Can you help us demand that they take action on climate, right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema")
---
What Trump and his cronies don't realize is that there are huge upsides to a clean energy economy. Just look at Washington state -- we're the #1 state economy in the nation, the #1 state leader in job growth, and also a leader in clean energy.
Climate action will boost our economy and help our health. We'll see millions of new jobs and more equitable energy access. We'll also avoid hundreds of thousands of premature deaths from air pollution, and we will avert a massive refugee crisis that climate change will bring.
**So what are we going to choose? Extreme weather, starvation, home and habitat loss, and terrible health conditions? Or a clean energy economy that will work for everyone?**
There is still a chance to create the sustainable, clean energy system we need to prevent these drastic effects of climate change. But first, we need our national politicians to put the priority on our environment and our economy, and stop listening to coal and oil lobbyists.
[**It's time to tell Trump to pay attention to climate change. Join Jay Inslee today in demanding that our national governments step up to the challenge of a clean energy economy!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Team Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9822/121549177/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b490/2f5ea88d/74687947/2cbd9821/121549177/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&refcode=ema_2018-10-23_mid-month-4-resend&utm_campaign=mid-month-4-resend&utm_medium=ema")

name: Team Menendez
subject: Are you tuning in tomorrow night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

New Jersey voters deserve to have a candidate they can trust.

That isn't a radical new idea by any means -- but unfortunately, Bob Hugin has proven time and again that the people of New Jersey can't trust him.

His campaign has been spreading blatant lies about our team and Senator Menendez. And he is using his dirty money from price-gouging cancer patients to keep spreading those lies.

If Hugin is willing to lie to you during the campaign, there is no doubt he will lie to you on the debate stage and in Congress. But tomorrow night, the lies stop.

Tune into _NJTV News_ tomorrow night at 8 PM to watch the New Jersey U.S. Senate Debate.

[**While Senator Menendez is stopping Hugin's lies up on the debate stage, will you chip in $5 or more and help us stop Hugin's lies on the streets?**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce5/3af3c5d/39c7437b/4ec30ddf/3872129938/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-debate?gpsid=5_73_4636&refcode=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+While+Senator+Menendez+is+stopping+Hugin")

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce5/3af3c5d/39c7437b/4ec30dde/3872129938/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-debate?gpsid=5_73_4636&refcode=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Donate")**
Our staff thought it might be fun to ask our supporters to donate $1 per Hugin lie, but we quickly realized that based on how Hugin has run his campaign, that might run up the tab quickly.

So instead, while you watch the debate at home, make sure to live-tweet and call out Hugin every time he lies with the hashtag #AnotherHuginLie.

Your support will help Senator Menendez fight off these lies and ensure that we come out on top November 6th.

[**Chip in $5 or more right now and help us to keep spreading the truth and make sure to tune in tomorrow night at 8 PM to see Senator Bob Menendez win this debate and bring home a victory on Election Day.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ce5/3af3c5d/39c7437b/4ec30dd1/3872129938/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-debate?gpsid=5_73_4636&refcode=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreDeb_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+5+or+more+right+now+and+help+us+")

Thanks!

clean_body: Friend, New Jersey voters deserve to have a candidate they can trust. That isn't a radical new idea by any means -- but unfortunately, Bob Hugin has proven time and again that the people of New Jersey can't trust him. His campaign has been spreading blatant lies about our team and Senator Menendez. And he is using his dirty money from price-gouging cancer patients to keep spreading those lies. If Hugin is willing to lie to you during the campaign, there is no doubt he will lie to you on the debate stage and in Congress. But tomorrow night, the lies stop. Tune into NJTV News tomorrow night at 8 PM to watch the New Jersey U.S. Senate Debate. "" "" Our staff thought it might be fun to ask our supporters to donate $1 per Hugin lie, but we quickly realized that based on how Hugin has run his campaign, that might run up the tab quickly. So instead, while you watch the debate at home, make sure to live-tweet and call out Hugin every time he lies with the hashtag #AnotherHuginLie. Your support will help Senator Menendez fight off these lies and ensure that we come out on top November 6th. "+" Thanks! Team Menendez "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: not looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I hate to say it, Friends, but things aren't looking good. Roll Call says I'm the ** _most vulnerable Democrat_** in the entire country, and my opponent, Josh Hawley, and his dark-money backers will do anything to flip this seat. **They've already spent nearly $20 million attacking me - and you can bet there's more where that came from.
**
You know what happens if we let them win? They'll strip healthcare from millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions and allow a reckless trade war that hurts our farmers and manufacturers to continue. President Trump will get another rubber stamp for the most dangerous parts of his agenda.

**We can't let that happen. We CAN stop them, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right now:
**
[**Please, Friends, click here to rush a donation to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat so we can win and fight back against the worst parts of President Trump's agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk927-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk927-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk927-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk927-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk927-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for being a crucial part of this team.

Claire

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Socialism belongs in the dustbin of history
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 23, 2018
# **Socialism belongs in the dustbin of history**
**With the 200th anniversary of Karl Marx’s birth,** socialism is making a comeback in America. Democrats used to accuse Republicans of fear-mongering when they called out certain far-left policy ideas as “socialist.” Now, a growing number of Democrats are wearing the label as a badge of honor. **American socialists** may imagine their proposals mirror those in Northern European countries such as Sweden and Norway. In reality, ideas along the lines of “Medicare for All” have more in common with economists’ traditional definition of socialism. The record of countries who have experimented with those types of command-and-control systems is devastating: Maoist China, the Soviet Union, and Venezuela among them. [](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1054850960793759744)[Something to share: Socialism has a long legacy of failure across the world.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1054850960793759744) **The sky-high taxes needed to fund** “Medicare for All” alone, for example, would lead to a staggering $17,000 drop in household incomes after taxes and healthcare expenditures—a 19 percent decline. Without taxing American workers, funding this radical plan would require cuts to half of the Federal budget, wrecking Medicaid, Social Security, and traditional Medicare in the process. **Socialist policies have failed** across the world wherever they are tested. They have no place in the United States of America. [Get the facts: What Democrats will take from you to push their socialist agenda. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/congressional-democrats-want-take-money-hardworking-americans-fund-failed-socialist-policies/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Full report:**[The true costs of socialism](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cea-report-opportunity-costs-socialism/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# **The truth about America’s border crisis**
**Americans see reports daily** about the caravan of Central American migrants headed for the U.S. border. As of yesterday, a United Nations official estimated that 7,200 individuals and counting have now joined its ranks. **These numbers are stunning,** but the latest immigration figures show a surge of family units and unaccompanied minors from Central America arriving in the United States illegally each day. Responding to catch-and-release loopholes, illegal immigration has shifted from primarily single adults from Mexico to family units and unaccompanied minors from Central America. [By the numbers: Democrat-backed loopholes drive our border crisis](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/numbers-understanding-border-crisis-driven-congressional-democrat-backed-loopholes/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump addresses State and local officials from Alaska, California, and Hawaii at the White House State Leadership Day in the South Court Auditorium** | October 23, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDIzLjk2NjU1MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyMy45NjY1NTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA0OTY4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

_I need your help today, friend._ _**As of today, we are exactly 2 weeks out from Election Day.**_ And I'm reaching out because this race is very tight, and I cannot close this race strong and keep AZ-01 blue alone. Fourteen days to go, Peter, and **our new poll shows we 're just 4 points away from catching McClintock.**
_Victory is within reach._ But only one thing will close this gap--we need to push harder than ever in these final two weeks. To do that, we need to get our third ad on the air by the end of this week.
Right now, we don't *quite* have the resources to buy that airtime--but with the way this team always steps up, we know we can do it.
**We 're in striking distance of beating McClintock on November 6th--but we need to raise $9,600 by tonight to be able to get our newest message on the air and start closing our polling gap. Can you rush us a contribution now?**
