name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We have two weeks until Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The time has flown quickly, but Election Day is exactly two weeks from today. This race is tied, many voters remain undecided, and this district will be won or lost over the next 14 days.
| | Peter, More than a year and a half ago, I saw Rep. Dave Brat vote to undermine critical protections for Virginians with pre-existing health conditions, and I decided that I could not sit on the sidelines. I had to stand up and run myself. At the beginning, we had a small team, operating mostly out of my kitchen. I made our first fundraising calls and we planned our first events. **Now, it is October 23rd, 2018.** Our team has grown to include more than 5,000 volunteers and a busy campaign headquarters. We have held 141 meet-and-greets and we have pushed a district that was once viewed as safely Republican to a pure toss-up. _**The time has flown quickly, but Election Day is exactly two weeks from today, Peter.**_ [**And I am writing you today to ask for your support in this critical final stretch.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4JCVojr8RM8Zmhawq5MyNgc_tfyThrbi3os5TNCnys8=/aiA_Jra0odKX2CDAulss98RiMXhHctO5rZougTakexM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We have the chance to do something very special here in VA-7. But this race is tied, and many voters remain undecided. This district will be won or lost over the next 14 days. [**Please consider making a donation to our campaign today to power us through the next two weeks.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4JCVojr8RM8Zmhawq5MyNgc_tfyThrbi3os5TNCnys8=/aiA_Jra0odKX2CDAulss98RiMXhHctO5rZougTakexM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We will only win this race together. Thank you, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4JCVojr8RM8Zmhawq5MyNgc_tfyThrbi3os5TNCnys8=/aiA_Jra0odKX2CDAulss98RiMXhHctO5rZougTakexM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.23_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4JCVojr8RM8Zmhawq5MyNgc_tfyThrbi3os5TNCnys8=/aiA_Jra0odKX2CDAulss98RiMXhHctO5rZougTakexM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/4JCVojr8RM8Zmhawq5MyNgc_tfyThrbi3os5TNCnys8=/ZqmTeqRy7TaB20wnOV3XE9YOvayWT5WS8K8eO66p6cU=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

clean_body: "" "" Team -- a MTN-MSU poll released less than 24 hours ago has the make-or-break Montana Senate race within the margin of error. With just two weeks until the election, this race is a toss-up. Democratic Senator Jon Tester is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country, but he put country ahead of politics and voted no on Kavanaugh's Supreme Court confirmation. That courage comes at a cost for his re-election (just look at the how tight the polls are!), so we need to have his back like he's had ours. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Tester and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Trump is throwing the kitchen sink at Jon. Just a few days ago, he even held a rally in Montana specifically to smear Jon's record and try to flip this seat to Republican control. This race is going to come down to the wire, everyone, and we can't leave anything to chance. "" Thank you, Team Maggie ""

body:
If you need a perfect example of everything wrong with our country's immigration policies, just look to the caravan of immigrants heading to our bord
****

Friend, if you need a perfect example of everything wrong with our country's immigration policies, just look to the caravan of immigrants heading to our border with Mexico.

They're not seeking asylum, friend. They're seeking amnesty!

And if Tammy Baldwin had her way, she'd give it to them.

❌ Tammy Baldwin does NOT support a secure border.
❌ She does NOT support ICE.
❌ She even stood by radical liberals to shut down the government over DACA this year!

She's not an ally to Wisconsin when it comes to immigration, and it's about time we had a Senator who stood with President Trump to Make America Safe Again!
** ** **[I AGREE: MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN>>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYJhofBw-eRAp7PgPi_QorRp2hc_MzIQHkcrZwP4DQ_Y_zm3oiRB00DoDmzvzJrbYHvdAtBJPeK2dXBqDInMhFmoTEncuQXa_9Y4fmocuPPz51ui9OBcyRBQkzvjT8wE3Z58gABfcGej1P6vdD13BZ2PaXtX9--5L0AhxtwbD5esUoKTijliwZSQm4JjpD-0fq7ykt4pvfiDpueOQcrm0amIe3cIs57P2QVadJyzbxnHrxcn58WYqyLfw-dyJTa5ApP4CFTy-ic1nxiP70VqXjQNKOAZWI-QEbuCjUydyj1_6sZ2hbk7_ususTZ9wqSKfktIeAOcZ7v-ymMBkNK1vh-vdgr17N1pJQfoYd7HOe4Lj2kQC63d0fxTFuzYHZ-U1OADfgJr9BP8ziHllXHGb_1c%3D)**
---
** **
When President Trump visits tomorrow, I’m going to share with him our thoughts on this dangerous caravan, and I want to show him just how many Wisconsinites are on his side in the fight to FINALLY secure our border.

The Washington elites like Tammy Baldwin want us to stand by while our country is INVADED by unknown immigrants who could be bringing drugs, crime, or who knows what into our country!

I'm glad that President Trump will not be discouraged by liberal obstruction or threats – I know he will do what's best. He will get the job done and protect our country in in any way possible.
**[TELL TRUMP: I SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYJhofBw-eRAp7PgPi_QorRp2hc_MzIQHkcrZwP4DQ_Y_zm3oiRB00DoDmzvzJrbYHvdAtBJPeK2dXBqDInMhFmoTEncuQXa_9Y4fmocuPPz51ui9OBcyRBQkzvjT8wE3Z58gABfcGej1P6vdD13BZ2PaXtX9--5L0AhxtwbD5esUSVp9V-bupBiwGGUmk2lKoSL_SNlFIkHHOZp3SFPIoesT6YQ8TG97pynxbESquhxJmWSTrJiGKFuC-MEsw0njGEvfgxvqvPr9U9vJDjQWRC3emY9lT9k-YmrCZ0l9m0tMuOdoOcyB0zpL7s0Y5prMtVzutBH6fOqKdrDFnrgs43-BWT1i4iqB4BvPlpR997Pr8gFxtTigtnecXf0JvYhNpqj58WNXJ8ryljI9dQDfSQ0%3D)**
---

By standing strong at our southern border, we will be able to counter the thousands flooding into our states who put American lives at risk.

President Trump deserves recognition for doing what it takes to make America safer – and I am going to show him just how proud we are. [**ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYJhofBw-eRAp7PgPi_QorRp2hc_MzIQHkcrZwP4DQ_Y_zm3oiRB00DoDmzvzJrbYHvdAtBJPeK2dXBqDInMhFmoTEncuQXa_9Y4fmocuPPz51ui9OBcyRBQkzvjT8wE3Z58gABfcGej1P6vdD13BZ2PaXtX9--5L0AhxtwbD5esUCm6q7IhTxyK-1TD580bCgpVv6jJviL2jxJJDJHyPKRn1lVN24HOmr7xtKMdI1ILaTq3o6qlTD3b5XUZxdwBuwSMkhDDDF_7TuNO4YUWLG-DSiYrJ2W00bsMcGy9iCaV4kSr24_kPEVPGRtECoX3G6qKAD7ffLG8hzuCbD3I1uraeP4OabOWzFHUhcfFgJQqpPAU2MqB8mCH-TKMI3_gEb-o1eb5i-tjOKvvFo_kBenE%3D)

Please, add your name here to show President Trump that we support his effort to SECURE OUR BORDER: **[secure.anedot.com/leah/secure-border/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYJhofBw-eRAp7PgPi_QorRp2hc_MzIQHkcrZwP4DQ_Y_zm3oiRB00DoDmzvzJrbYHvdAtBJPeK2dXBqDInMhFmoTEncuQXa_9Y4fmocuPPz51ui9OBcyRBQkzvjT8wE3Z58gABfcGej1P6vdD13BZ2PaXtX9--5L0AhxtwbD5esUuLuRPUa_M4IvIqNE-IQDq_wToR_0fhuOiHTmw8W9Fy-8k_TJvym6Jvw9dnm4dJDmNMnjMsLhtbzMlunofo9Ly47JhBFQbxskBKZWgF-HSPuTUlubS4I7KbzcPB9ofkM3quqaD5QxOTviNOEnRdlH1eqHhSQpLAZ5XZrp9nL-uq7uREdToc_1pwlqq79qOiN19cAWKyaCzlgD7Y45PTvQm4wdvhSWSETtB8pqHr5uwMA%3D)**

-Leah

**[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYCmj_m9idrUxJlL4Mb7O_DzO_qp-Kxn5KZEO2H7sUaehkNp6KCiIrB6YmrrWSg-kTnWEc0JnO6tteaSXU65eqCcphksoB1AOf2jET28dX8ul_LdJottrs2cOuLDIybR5th4amUf1-6zUE31dONcpQFyouwmHV5kBjAxWFR9129VhEhHfY_PnzYI8Lob3sp8mPDcgiSl_4gC7-wtYhtCEhejl2zAcHcHaf68sR-E5FiYI6OOp1gKcJIn7NFlUf7rXLw%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYL_p7BTi6DRehT7tLTZQl2wN8dB4vIUaemOdRnc9I9aVcjskPicS3-9oHXhCTYt6DJwUKzn9_1qt0-KhwktY19eejHFQOkJARn3IoOExY3fef2ZSUWIuiw-niAG4qf2-ABML582sM_Xf0NMNoOnW6hAYUBGKv7IUROHtjFHaDL9ptQJQPhswdbDgkzwDT7WRENnBPyOpyR5C_l4CGCARSnpOeFZ5HVwWzW829UB69Y42ucCnbQjobuzOZMATf12uEQ%3D%3D) **

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=v-Qa_XjfRogD3P08pmkFuCWwdlC3RPuot9mLZx4K06-2e7uA4emDWTxJu6hdYRHZNqE-alXleQcs2kpoi3xWG_7OBGVQ2KWuLaSH9K6AHo1VzHHnC-39dj13ZvJ95TkJEwbJM5o_mxI3R5hb20FViGhosZlJOnQCfUzpeOkGlUSU5B9AneEiR5goOrfrRSIL8KAWkAFwx9oyJLhNZynQp4LCq89IjF5FGJrb9m8i4LQpEq17pBeq6R68W4cXeSJs). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYG_wp-BME9rfGPVVQDyKLsoH0hUYsBEbAOYynNW4vUcvvRbtJlT7_xHLTBrQzWqhN_q1gD-YiVfL3vE3D55OHNz0aucYB6jPejs8nCexdb1wdoCQiSruEkxmZkHLV9xWLRIJp3K_7_NmNuhMTeo_BTY-GUe6UPZhXB1_8qeh-wDZRWIWTUSxokiiAjEOKtmhZ1PNNnR7vQXAiXSuBVxT6rZbXa5SwTN-Hc0_A8GYpggD89A7CoR9XblwzEom4ddEGbMbDI8TiPqmLtT8pff6-oMQG6PSE2WHfgenMaZXhbr-LFOzlGzEQQJURXs1zV5rWWtr5D8olqhEXYHDOneoCYQVDdl4KeXgCFYAIxu0kNdn) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYG_wp-BME9rfGPVVQDyKLsrbUb3CddcXOAZ1gbUWtkV7mBry3rU3ZCCM5K3qBCh8au7zrP4T3EIwATTCSaNOFHT9ZeiilN_BK8Obvzm5vOdN--QJ6vhmEquFiK5oCCKPJqhdT3pOtYqXFf7r_pZ-FgzhWm2owRd9VvoHNm49rFLaf9L7mcbiyL8roTcizHbcq86cRLmcOpVdbVzIVCUuub1_n5521vVXS9bVAF3Dx7IhVt_Acqprpp18E1_KLwVi-Qzs1Z-RRqFvDTCFDoioOpUitrZiYdpHlUdT6H7amqXb84uu3eGC2gvXW9Nrm9HnBHniA-wVMQ8qj5sCFJVcCvABrEHFS4zGzW9TchT3lprH) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYCmj_m9idrUxJlL4Mb7O_DzO_qp-Kxn5KZEO2H7sUaehn46LSAD7RqWzTa04rXHoeXAD86TPOElyMWoPSSQVELKA_Fj3bK_24_XTAySYlOzePmZz4vCOSDlYqya-Hi6jxW1LVzkfipOcKMbtag4fxvlP5WMzNrWlA9pkGcDt1BmC12eXOcEoCeLu0sKiV1wwjdckYXFOPqKvY_MVQ1e8onRgrlSIhVQmiwJ8uUNjj-LSDZ5LxW6Q_dOGzciB-xlMcw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYL_p7BTi6DRehT7tLTZQl2wN8dB4vIUaemOdRnc9I9aVGm0BoFrnu4ObSbzqPBeJRxoHTes6js_DPZNiMMFscjTilenS75tsZJ5jyhdsO69BIONCAEZHj4mG4iIg7LIi7b-KEX4gKA9lP7kgFsgaTXnlFAokxatcQx4JY5Na_cCzposUhn7WuEv9SoRC_8VEzxxAO0ki9sDqFQaL2-gAtyrAwSxz92H5l8GDpL7KAOZ0vdNp69OEQ20lOVU6fPOQKw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYDWL1UMIvP_hTSjfxYlGAL-SVZ1bPg0cpr5pPWYBFFQxNT1L5iIKUq51VOdLOE7Kdlj9sLg9JIS7VRSuNUkf0FO5SbPKRq6Ty9UwSIwulkCMC5NFTdIK9LKkM4SJAcV-nbUiobR_hgCZ5c2I44sHNcniLgeFEPa4wbrL2icj_y5lR_fK_vNdxs3Kw4RmNJ3ZHvJurlM6rEE9Cx-SztiGfNf5Y6z66TePNY9ANaopQXNTFEOEOsqDryeKrvxaTP3ecg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=S7DV9ruuPRyF73s8YYWHYG_wp-BME9rfGPVVQDyKLsqaWcnS2n5ERzdx6fbzT8eBSydotCkI94W_p_U-69iGDObAQRNrqENNuDu4A2KsK3_8KcOiExJDmRUgrW-ZIMofxkO2tGbAwLVj97TmhJVqCi4d0UbRH-SNRLj-lKrJhJH7J5N_X2MQUSAanzoUC2DFbCa9nMsAdqo_9kfDdiTs_xlT49RGtoTuxCX41m3YjHbp7Hs8VQSMqupuTnsCCBYBYPcRXyUVVTP-3909Wbo6u0KF5800KjGgnXIbXh5zx1IRmdg-2GPBVkWn2sa_Z8YrlXO9CT1bbGi0710_kuzBAh76ly5WT88WWPjmu_nXtYcdmfLbx1uvt-3e-TgQadL7yt9JwyyRErmdDiKZFkmVHg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=v-Qa_XjfRogD3P08pmkFuCWwdlC3RPuot9mLZx4K06-2e7uA4emDWTxJu6hdYRHZNqE-alXleQcs2kpoi3xWG_7OBGVQ2KWuLaSH9K6AHo1VzHHnC-39dj13ZvJ95TkJEwbJM5o_mxI3R5hb20FViGhosZlJOnQCfUzpeOkGlUSU5B9AneEiR5goOrfrRSIL8KAWkAFwx9oyJLhNZynQp4LCq89IjF5FGJrb9m8i4LQpEq17pBeq6R68W4cXeSJs) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=882d7ceaf0a44344ac6329b0930f2c5c&_e=v-Qa_XjfRogD3P08pmkFuCWwdlC3RPuot9mLZx4K06-2e7uA4emDWTxJu6hdYRHZNqE-alXleQcs2kpoi3xWG_7OBGVQ2KWuLaSH9K6AHo1VzHHnC-39dj13ZvJ95TkJEwbJM5o_mxI3R5hb20FViGhosZlJOnQCfUzpeOkGlUSU5B9AneEiR5goOrfrRSIL8KAWkAFwx9oyJLhNZynQp4LCq89IjF5FGJrb9m8i4LQpEq17pBeq6R68W4cXeSJs) to unsubscribe. clean_body: If you need a perfect example of everything wrong with our country's immigration policies, just look to the caravan of immigrants heading to our bord ** Friend, if you need a perfect example of everything wrong with our country's immigration policies, just look to the caravan of immigrants heading to our border with Mexico. They're not seeking asylum, friend. They're seeking amnesty! And if Tammy Baldwin had her way, she'd give it to them. ❌ Tammy Baldwin does NOT support a secure border. ❌ She does NOT support ICE. ❌ She even stood by radical liberals to shut down the government over DACA this year! She's not an ally to Wisconsin when it comes to immigration, and it's about time we had a Senator who stood with President Trump to Make America Safe Again! When President Trump visits tomorrow, I’m going to share with him our thoughts on this dangerous caravan, and I want to show him just how many Wisconsinites are on his side in the fight to FINALLY secure our border. The Washington elites like Tammy Baldwin want us to stand by while our country is INVADED by unknown immigrants who could be bringing drugs, crime, or who knows what into our country! I'm glad that President Trump will not be discouraged by liberal obstruction or threats – I know he will do what's best. He will get the job done and protect our country in in any way possible. By standing strong at our southern border, we will be able to counter the thousands flooding into our states who put American lives at risk. President Trump deserves recognition for doing what it takes to make America safer – and I am going to show him just how proud we are. Friend, there's no doubt we've GOT to take action to solve our nation’s illegal immigration problem. President Trump is headed in the right direction by stopping this caravan. Please, add your name here to show President Trump that we support his effort to SECURE OUR BORDER: Thank you, friend. -Leah P.S. If you’re taking a legal caravan with your friends and family to the Wausau area tomorrow for the rally with President Trump, make sure you get your tickets here: Paid for by Leah for Senate

| | | **BREAKING: "In Leaked Audio, Brian Kemp Expresses Concern Over Georgians Exercising Their Right to Vote" -_Rolling Stone_** This is outrageous - At a closed event, Brian Kemp was caught ON TAPE saying that our Voter Outreach operation "continues to concern [him], especially if everybody uses and exercises their right to vote." Instead of celebrating record early vote turnout, Kemp is looking to his Republican friends for help. Why? _Because he knows Stacey can win!_ Now we need to step up our game and get even MORE Georgians to the polls to make sure we can beat this guy in November. Here's what you can do to help: **[Make your plan to vote early today! Visit our website for more information about where you can vote early and what you'll need to bring with you in order to ensure your vote is counted.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa712/34a064cc/1b3d3d0/70d5d8e/455256431/VEsE/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vote/")** **[Then sign up for a volunteer shift near you so you can help others in your community make their voices heard too! We really need your help to Get Out The Vote in these final two weeks.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa712/34a064cc/1b3d3d0/70d5d8f/455256431/VEsF/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** This is important: Every vote now brings us one step closer to victory on November 6th. name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: New Poll: Braun Takes the Lead!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Momentum is swinging our way! Two new polls have been released this week, and they show that Mike Braun is now leading over Democrat Joe Donnelly... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/braun-takes-the-lead-w8nim22vg0?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **ANOTHER POLL:
BRAUN TAKES THE LEAD!**
---
| **Momentum is Swinging Toward Braun **

---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e572bce2f6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Donald Trump Jr. Rallies Hoosiers!**
---
|
---
| Friends,

It's a big week. Yesterday, as Donald Trump Jr. rallied hundreds of Hoosiers in Greenfield in support of Mike Braun and Greg Pence, [a new internal campaign memo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8566a694cd&e=1acd9bb3d6) showed that Braun has taken the LEAD in the U.S. Senate race.

And then today, we got more exciting news. **Another poll now shows Mike Braun -- our conservative outsider and businessman -- LEADING in the race!**

In fact, [the new poll](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34ae798f25&e=1acd9bb3d6), conducted by IndyPolitics and Mason Strategies, shows Mike Braun with a 47% - 43% lead!

This follows the new [internal campaign polling memo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c7327c0f6&e=1acd9bb3d6) that we told you about yesterday, which shows Braun up consistently, all while more Hoosiers now have an unfavorable view of Democrat Joe Donnelly and his votes with his fellow Democrat obstructionists.

**There's no question that this is going to be a close race. Everything you do to help our team between now and Election Day matters, which is why it's critical that you do three things:**
---
|
---
| _**1.) VOTE**
You don't want to wake up after the election and realize your non-vote may have cost us this race. If you think there's a chance you may be busy on November 6, make sure you vote early. Visit [vote.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f9d4412b5b&e=1acd9bb3d6) to find your polling place and hours.

**2.) HELP SHARE THE WORD**
Polls show that there's still a large number of Hoosiers who are undecided in this race. In order to win, it's critical that we persuade these voters to support our team of proven Republican leaders. Would you be willing to [contribute a few hours](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=66c52b2c5f&e=1acd9bb3d6) toward making phone calls or going door to door this weekend to help more voters hear our message?

**3.) ATTEND A RIGHT TRACK RESULTS TOUR RALLY!**
Republicans like Mike Braun and Governor Eric Holcomb are crisscrossing Indiana with the Right Track Results Tour. We're holding meet-and-greet events and rallies throughout the state, and would love to see you at one of our upcoming stops. [Check out the schedule here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ca3a9c209c&e=1acd9bb3d6)!_
---
|
---
| Election Day is in _two weeks_! We're in the home stretch, but we can't deliver victory without you!

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---
| [Find Your Voting Info](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=578da48d5b&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Find Your Voting Info")
---
| [Sign Up to Volunteer](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc17b4bd95&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Sign Up to Volunteer")
---
| [Attend a Right Track Results Tour Rally](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc8929bb25&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Attend a Right Track Results Tour Rally")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5e506c40a2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=638c06eae0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d8a9368bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)

You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a4672e02a&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=74a242d566&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Donnelly Political Director
subject: You only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
There's not much time left! With early voting already underway, I'm asking you to sign up to volunteer for our campaign. Because you only have two options in this race: |
---
[]()

| | **"New poll: Braun, Donnelly still in a statistical tie 2 weeks before Election Day"**
_\-- Indy Star_ There's not much time left, Peter!

With **early voting already underway ,** I'm asking you to [**sign up to volunteer for our campaign.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d8c/7377f838/2658dcbc/51f8b511/2531013826/VEsH/ "https://joeforindiana.com/events/") Because you only have two options in this race:
1. [**You can answer the call and sign up for a shift (maybe two, or even three).**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d8c/7377f838/2658dcbc/51f8b511/2531013826/VEsE/ "https://joeforindiana.com/events/") Because grassroots supporters like you step up, we're able to pull off the most ambitious field operation in Indiana midterm history. **_Joe WINS on Election Day_** , and Mitch McConnell's plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act and slash Medicare and Social Security are dead in the water!

2. **You ignore our urgent request, assuming that someone else will volunteer instead.** Everyone else does the same, and **_Joe LOSES on Election Day._** With a copy machine for President Trump taking over Indiana's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell repeals the Affordable Care Act, passes even more tax breaks for wealthy donors, and puts Medicare on the chopping block.

**Election Day is in exactly two weeks, and _one of these outcomes WILL become the reality._** Which one it is depends on you.

[**Will you help us make sure Joe BEATS Rep. Mike Braun on November 6th?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d8c/7377f838/2658dcbc/51f8b511/2531013826/VEsF/ "https://joeforindiana.com/events/")

Thanks,
Mike

name: Tina Smith
subject: Hitting this goal is how we keep our ads on the air and fund everything we need to get out the vote over the next 14 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Friend, we've seen the polls tighten to just a few points.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, we've seen the polls tighten to just a few points. We've seen big name Republicans like Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Marco Rubio fly in to Minnesota to fundraise and rally their base to defeat me. And we've seen our opponent launch attack after attack to try to stop us. They have money and power, but what matters now is how much energy you bring to fight back. I truly believe that a grassroots campaign can take on any odds, defeat anything set against them. But that means I'm counting on you to be the difference. Every night we check our fundraising totals to see if we met our daily goal --- and my team tells me we still need to raise $12,000 to stay on track for today. **[Can I count on you to pitch in before midnight? Hitting this goal is how we keep our ads on the air and fund everything we need to get out the vote over the next 14 days.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[Donate Now](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181023PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** We can take on everything they are throwing against us, stop Republicans from turning this Senate seat red, and stop Trump's extreme agenda in Washington -- but it's going to take a true people-powered movement to do it. I'm counting on you. Tina
---

name: Scott Arceneaux, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: About tomorrow's debate
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/2400336e/4220396210/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Tomorrow, Mayor Andrew Gillum will once again take to the debate stage with Ron DeSantis -- but there's still a big unanswered question from the first debate on Sunday night.

In between the 21 lies he delivered in 60 minutes, DeSantis dodged a straightforward question about whether or not he thinks President Trump is a good role model for the children of Florida.

Listen, we know that DeSantis is a Trump acolyte. He's treated his campaign for Governor like an audition for "The Apprentice" and mimicked Trump's xenophobia from the very first day of the general election. His support for Donald Trump is unwavering and undeniable.

**[But Dishonest DeSantis thinks he can fool the voters. Florida deserves better. So please, chip in $5 today and help us make sure we're ready for the next debate tomorrow.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/24003366/4220396210/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-leadership-fl-debate?gpsid=13_55_4663&refcode=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+But+Dishonest+DeSantis+thinks+he+can+foo")**

At a rally last night in Houston, Donald Trump referred to himself as a "nationalist." It's the same kind of divisive and dangerous rhetoric that emboldened white supremacists in Charlottesville.

If Ron DeSantis still can't say definitively that Donald Trump is not a good role model for our children, then Floridians can never trust him to stand up to special interests or hold Donald Trump accountable.

But with just two weeks until Election Day, we don't expect Ron DeSantis to grow a spine or have a change of heart. In fact, we expect DeSantis and his allies to double down on the lies and deception -- so that's where you step in.

**[We need your help to make sure we have the resources to fight back after tomorrow's debate. So can we count on you to chip in $5 or more now?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/24003379/4220396210/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-leadership-fl-debate?gpsid=13_55_4663&refcode=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+We+need+your+help+to+make+sure+we+have+t")**

Thank you,

Scott Arceneaux
Senior Adviser
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/24003378/4220396210/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-leadership-fl-debate?gpsid=13_55_4663&refcode=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/2400337b/4220396210/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3657/9e00690/5546b3da/2400337d/4220396210/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=14+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181023_PreLeadFL_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")

name: Mark Warner
subject: Real quick, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Two weeks from Election Day in Virginia, Derek. Here are some important updates: --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm writing today to ask for your help and I'll try to keep it short:
* We're two weeks away,
* Stewart could be within single digits of Tim Kaine based on some recent polls,
* Tim's team has had to make some budget cuts in the past couple of weeks and this has impacted some of their plans to turn out Virginians on Election Day.

We need to re-elect Tim and we also need to make sure Democratic turnout is high in every single district so all of our great House Democrats have a fighting chance.

**Tim 's team can't afford to miss another goal, so will you rush a donation today to make sure they raise $3,500 more by tonight and can get back on track for October?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10c7/3e0906/775a29b8/3e37d5fa/4095397743/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-stewart-fundraising?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181023_3_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+5&utm_campaign=20181023_3_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND-RS&source=20181023_3_FR_MRW_October-Warner-LDND-RS")
